# netbox_ip_range (Resource)

Manages a NetBox IP range.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `end_address` (String) Ending IP address in the range.
- `start_address` (String) Starting IP address in the range.

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the IP range.
- `status` (String) Status of the IP range (active, reserved, deprecated).
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this IP range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this IP range.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing IP range with matching start/end addresses instead of creating a new one.
- `vrf` (Number) VRF ID that contains this IP range.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
